name: Garlic Saffron Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon saffron dissolved in rice vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree the small clove of garlic, saffron dissolved in some rice vinegar, and pimientos.
2. Add mayonnaise to taste.
3. Add more rice vinegar to taste and season with salt and crushed red pepper.
4. If desired, thin the mixture with water.
